text:
風と雷を操るエネミーが
普通にいんだぜー？
ふざけてるよな！

しかも竜巻を飛ばしてくるわ
雷はドカドカ落としてくるわ
マジ卑怯だろ！

あいつらを鎮圧しろとかさ
本当勘弁って感じだぜ。
絶対大変だって。

そこで思ったわけよ!
おたくの戦い方なら、勉強になるしさ
スムーズにいくだろ？

ってわけで、頼むよ！
オレはいつも通り見てるか

Enemies that control wind and lightning are
totally normal? Yeah, right!

They send freakin' tornadoes at you and dump
bolts of lightning everywhere!
How messed up is that!?

I'll take a real hard pass on tryin' ta put
down those bozos. That just ain't happening.

...And that's when it hit me! With your fightin'
style, you could take 'em down easy peasy,
and I could learn a lot on top of it, yeah?

So, you're up!
I'll be keepin' a close eye on you, as always!
